sections.title: Active Channels
sections.description: Select which channels this agent responds on.

fields.label: Channels
fields.help: The agent will only respond on selected channels. Channels must be configured in Connectivity > Channels first.

fields.label: Default Channel
fields.help: Primary channel for this agent — used by the dashboard 'Chat' button

fields.label: Adapt Formatting to Platform
fields.help: Automatically adjust message formatting for each platform (e.g., no markdown tables on Discord, no headers on WhatsApp)
